Package io.github.lunasaw.sip.common.pool

Class SipPoolManager

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.sip.common.pool.SipPoolManager
@Component public class SipPoolManager extends Object
SIP连接池管理器 负责连接池的定期维护、监控和清理工作
Author:
luna
